CGTN

Copied

The latest ITTF (International Table Tennis Federation) world team ranking released on Monday allocated the last seven spots for the 2024 Paris Olympic Games, including three men's teams and four women's, which completed the qualified list of 16 teams each.

India, Poland, Sweden and Thailand took the women's berths. Croatia, India and Slovenia secured spots on the men's side.

The 16 men's teams set to compete in Paris this summer are Australia, Brazil, Canada, China, Chinese Taipei, Croatia, Denmark, Egypt, France, Germany, India, Japan, South Korea, Portugal, Slovenia and Sweden.

The 16 women's teams are Australia, Brazil, China, Chinese Taipei, Egypt, France, Germany, India, Japan, South Korea, Poland, Romania, Sweden, Thailand, the United States and Hong Kong, China.

Singles players will be seeded based on the ITTF world rankings due to be published later in July.

(With input from Xinhua)

(Cover: An aerial view of the ITTF Mixed Team World Cup in Chengdu, southwest China's Sichuan Province in December 2024. /CFP)

title: Seven teams secure final spots for Paris 2024 table tennis competition - CGTN
